MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Motion For Summary Judgment Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Leave To File Second Motion For Summary Judgment Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion For Leave To File Second Motion For Summary Judgment Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court grants CCSF leave to file a second MSJ/MSA provided the motion is filed and served consistent with the statute and noticed for hearing at least 30 days prior to the trial date. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 437c(a).) The court does not anticipate allowing the motion to be heard less than 30 days before trial.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
